title: Shri Krishna Ji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Krishna Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Krishna.
description:
Aarti Kunjbihari ki, Shri Giridhar Krishna Murari ki.
॥ Aarti Kunjbihari ki ॥

Gale mein vaijanti mala, bajave murali madhur bala.
Shravan mein kundal jhalkala, Nand ke anand Nandlala.
Gagan sam ang kanti kali, Radhika chamak rahi aali.
Latan mein thadhe banmali, bhramar si alak kasturi tilak, chandra si jhalak, lalit chhavi Shyama pyari ki.
॥ Aarti Kunjbihari ki ॥

Kanakmay mor mukut bilsai, devta darsan ko tarsai.
Gagan so suman rasi barsai, baje muraj aur ghor mridang, gwalini karat ras ki rang.
Atul rati gop kumari ki.
॥ Aarti Kunjbihari ki ॥

Jahan te prakat bhayi Ganga, sakal kalush kalimal taranga.
Sahun se mukhmuni avranga, sahaj mukhchandra mukh neeko, darsat chakradhar Shrihari ko.
Jaani chhavi nirkhi banwari ki.
॥ Aarti Kunjbihari ki ॥

Kanakmay mor mukut bilsai, devta darsan ko tarsai.
Gagan so suman rasi barsai, baje muraj aur ghor mridang, gwalini karat ras ki rang.
Atul rati gop kumari ki.
॥ Aarti Kunjbihari ki ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Shri Krishna's Aarti?
faq.a1: This Aarti is performed to fill the heart with devotion, selfless love, and divine bliss.
faq.q2: Which day is most auspicious to worship Lord Krishna?
faq.a2: Janmashtami and Wednesdays are considered highly auspicious for his worship.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) should be made to Lord Krishna during Aarti?
faq.a3: Lord Krishna is extremely fond of Makhan (fresh butter), Mishri (sugar candy), and Tulsi leaves.
faq.q4: Can Shri Krishna's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, you can perform it at home in front of his 'Bal Gopal' idol or any other form of his image.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting the 'Hare Krishna Hare Rama' Mahamantra after the Aarti is considered the most spiritually uplifting.
